english translation text:
Naturally I will start with the most high
Lord of the seas lord of the seven skies
Peace on Mohammed and salutations
Congratulations on this occasion
After Mohammed who is the master

urdu transliteration text:
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola Haidar Mola

Tera(13) rajab ki bazm sajai
Khoob hui phir madha sarai
english translation text: We adorned the gathering of the thirteenth of Rajab;And indulged then in (Ali's) lofty praise;

urdu transliteration text:
Ishq tera darvesh banaey
Ishq tera bakhshay daanai
english translation text: Your love makes (us) a mystic;Your love grants wisdom;

urdu transliteration text:
Khoob wila ka jaam piya tha
Phir bhi nashay mein main nahin dola
english translation text: We have drunk the intoxicant of your love;Yet are not giddy with intoxication.

urdu transliteration text:
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola Haidar Mola

english translation text:
Nasibi I have sincere question
Since when was gods choice an election?
From Adam to the best of creation

urdu transliteration text:
I'm the rejector you're the elector
Let’s see at Kawthar who's giving water?

Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola
Ali(a.S.)  Ali(a.S.) Mola Haidar Mola

Tu nay namaz-e-ishq sikhai
Tu nay humein toheed batai
english translation text: You taught us the prayers of love;You showed us Tauheed (the oneness of God);

urdu transliteration text:
Kon bayan kar paeyga mola(a.S.)
Teri fazilat teri barhai
english translation text: Who is able explain, oh master?Your superiority, your loftiness?

urdu transliteration text:
Parhnay laga woh tera qaseeda
Jab bhi kabhi quraan ko khola
english translation text: They begin to sing your praises;Whenever they open the Quran.

english translation text:
In the valley he commanded Musa
Enter the valley but take your shoes off
Mariam came to the house with Isa
But they were kindly denied from a Visa

urdu transliteration text:
See when haidar enters the chosen
The Ka'ba split like musas ocean

english translation text:
Nasibi I would love to convince you
But at the same time I have an issue
When I visit my Mawla haidar
There's not enough room for me to get through

So I would rather you keep your Mawla
Let me breath air next to my Mawla
